top_signals.title: US Army’s ‘Tropic Lightning’ Division ponders transformation lessons from Philippine war games
top_signals.summary: Because of HIMARS, Maj. Gen. Bartholomees pointed out his “division artillery is really what transformed the most.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI medical tools match or surpass doctors for advice
top_signals.summary: Two health models displayed clinical value across a range of diagnostic and treatment decisions, studies show
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Kristi Noem joins B.C. copper junior in advisory role
top_signals.summary: NovaRed Mining holds two early-stage copper exploration assets in the Canadian province.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: ‘Biggest spend of the cycle:’ Fairshake crypto PAC’s pick Barry Moore wins Alabama GOP Senate primary
top_signals.summary: Rep. Barry Moore clinched a win in Alabama after being bolstered by millions of dollars from the crypto industry.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
